launch-spacecraft.name: Launch + Spacecraft
launch-spacecraft.description: Rocket launch providers, lunar landers, satellite buses, and space infrastructure companies

satellite-data.name: Satellite + Space Data
satellite-data.description: Satellite internet, Earth observation, defense imagery, and space data-as-a-service

ai-networking.name: AI + Networking
ai-networking.description: Optical networking, lasers, transceivers, AI compute, and data center infrastructure

defense-drones.name: Defense + Drones
defense-drones.description: Military drones, autonomous combat aircraft, defense primes, and eVTOL

rf-telecom.name: RF + Telecom
rf-telecom.description: RF chips, signal processors, connectivity semiconductors, and telecom infrastructure

materials-aerospace.name: Materials + Aerospace
materials-aerospace.description: Rare earths, specialty metals, composites, and precision materials for rockets and satellites

RKLB.name: Rocket Lab USA
RKLB.catalysts: Neutron first launch Q4 2026; Anduril hypersonic; $2.2B record backlog
RKLB.risks: $76B cap on $800M rev (~95x); Neutron delays; SpaceX competition
RKLB.spaceRelevance: Core launch + satellite manufacturer. Purest space economy play.
RKLB.multibaggerNote: Best company but valuation already reflects it.

LUNR.name: Intuitive Machines
LUNR.catalysts: $800M Lanteris acquisition; Goonhilly ground station; NASA Artemis monopoly; first adj. EBITDA+
LUNR.risks: NASA budget risk; lunar mission failure; aggressive M&A
LUNR.spaceRelevance: Premier lunar economy company. Near-monopoly on NASA lunar delivery.
LUNR.multibaggerNote: Revenue tripling, profitability inflection, reasonable cap.

RDW.name: Redwire Corporation
RDW.catalysts: NATO Penguin Mk3 UAS; Army Stalker; DARPA Otter VLEO; Artemis optical systems
RDW.risks: Large net losses; dilution; high volatility
RDW.spaceRelevance: Spacecraft components, sensors, in-space manufacturing. Dual defense/space.

YSS.name: York Space Systems
YSS.catalysts: 3 acquisitions (Orbion, ALL.SPACE, Solestial); integrated satellite platform
YSS.risks: Only 9% organic growth; post-IPO hangover; M&A integration risk
YSS.spaceRelevance: Satellite bus manufacturer building one-stop-shop for complete satellite solutions.

VOYG.name: Voyager Technologies
VOYG.catalysts: Starlab commercial space station (ISS successor); DARPA Otter; raised guidance
VOYG.risks: Multi-billion dev program; $127M annual burn; ISS retirement timeline
VOYG.spaceRelevance: Building commercial successor to ISS. Most ambitious space infrastructure play.
VOYG.multibaggerNote: Generational opportunity if Starlab works. Smallest cap in group.

FLY.name: Firefly Aerospace
FLY.catalysts: Broadest portfolio (Alpha, Eclipse, Blue Ghost, Elytra, Ocula)
FLY.risks: Burn rate > revenue; $6.87B on $275M rev; Alpha reliability issues
FLY.spaceRelevance: Vertically integrated launch + lunar services. Launch-to-landing capability.

ASTS.name: AST SpaceMobile
ASTS.catalysts: 45-60 sats by EOY 2026; FCC commercial auth; 60 MNO partners; 3B+ subscribers
ASTS.risks: $191M/quarter burn; $41B on $71M rev; Starlink D2C competition
ASTS.spaceRelevance: Pure-play satellite-to-phone. Most direct space connectivity bet.

IRDM.name: Iridium Communications
IRDM.catalysts: NTN Direct with Vodafone/DT; $200M incremental rev by 2030; 2.5M subscribers
IRDM.risks: Flat service growth guide; Starlink/5G competition; 46x P/E
IRDM.spaceRelevance: Original global satellite communications company. Operational 66-sat constellation.

PL.name: Planet Labs
PL.catalysts: $900M backlog; defense rev +50%; Swedish Armed Forces contract; first adj. EBITDA+
PL.spaceRelevance: Largest fleet of Earth observation satellites. Core space data economy.
PL.multibaggerNote: Best EO company but stretched valuation.

BKSY.name: BlackSky Technology
BKSY.catalysts: $30M intl defense win; Gen-3 constellation; margins improving (43%→35% COGS)
BKSY.spaceRelevance: Real-time satellite imagery and geospatial analytics for defense ISR.
BKSY.multibaggerNote: Best risk/reward: low cap, high growth, near profitability.

SPIR.name: Spire Global
SPIR.catalysts: $150M+ NOAA pipeline; focused on weather/climate data; $65.5M PIPE
SPIR.spaceRelevance: Nanosatellite constellation for weather, climate, maritime data-as-a-service.
SPIR.multibaggerNote: Interesting niche but highest execution risk.

AMZN.name: Amazon (Project Kuiper)
AMZN.catalysts: 241 sats in orbit; 1 Gbps speeds; service launching mid-2026; rebranded to Amazon Leo
AMZN.risks: Starlink far ahead; FCC deadline pressure; $10B+ committed
AMZN.spaceRelevance: Project Kuiper/Leo satellite internet constellation. 3,236 target sats.
AMZN.multibaggerNote: Kuiper real but can't move a $2.85T stock.

LITE.name: Lumentum Holdings
LITE.catalysts: NVIDIA $2B investment; OCS backlog >$400M; CPO multi-hundred-million orders
LITE.spaceRelevance: Lasers and optics for inter-satellite laser links and free-space optical comms.
LITE.multibaggerNote: OCS leader but $75B cap limits upside.

COHR.name: Coherent Corp
COHR.catalysts: NVIDIA $2B partnership; DARPA Space-BACN; 6" InP capacity ahead of schedule
COHR.spaceRelevance: DARPA Space-BACN coherent optical transceivers for LEO inter-satellite links.
COHR.multibaggerNote: Strong AI growth, Space-BACN is space-relevant.

AAOI.name: Applied Optoelectronics
AAOI.catalysts: 800G shipping; 1.6T ramp; in-house laser vertical integration; $1.1B+ FY26 target
AAOI.risks: 441% YTD gain; customer concentration; FCF burn
AAOI.spaceRelevance: Transceivers applicable to satellite ground stations and high-speed optical links.
AAOI.multibaggerNote: Highest torque in AI optics, smallest cap, tripling revenue.

AVGO.name: Broadcom
AVGO.catalysts: OpenAI custom silicon; $73B AI backlog; VMware integration
AVGO.spaceRelevance: Networking silicon foundational for satellite ground ops and data processing.
AVGO.multibaggerNote: Exceptional company, wrong market cap for multi-bagger.

MRVL.name: Marvell Technology
MRVL.catalysts: NVIDIA $2B NVLink Fusion; custom XPU; AI-RAN for 5G/6G
MRVL.risks: Customer concentration; in-house silicon risk; $167B cap
MRVL.spaceRelevance: MGS subsidiary for A&D ASICs; edge computing for satellite ground infrastructure.
MRVL.multibaggerNote: Well-positioned but too large for multi-bagger.

ANET.name: Arista Networks
ANET.catalysts: AI networking rev doubling to $3.25B; XPO 12.8 Tbps; NVLink Fusion
ANET.spaceRelevance: High-performance networking for ground-based satellite data processing centers.

NVDA.name: NVIDIA
NVDA.catalysts: Space-1 Vera Rubin for orbital AI computing; Sophia Space partnership
NVDA.risks: $5.3T cap; AI cycle; export controls; custom silicon
NVDA.spaceRelevance: Space-1 Vera Rubin Module for orbital computing. De facto standard for satellite data processing.
NVDA.multibaggerNote: Coolest space project but impossible math at $5.3T.

KTOS.name: Kratos Defense
KTOS.catalysts: CCA Valkyrie USMC; 15-20 XQ-58s in 2026; $156B defense bill; hypersonics
KTOS.risks: 58% off highs; production ramp execution; budget risk
KTOS.spaceRelevance: Autonomous drones, hypersonic systems, satellite communications, rocket motors.
KTOS.multibaggerNote: CCA revolution leader, attractive entry at 58% off highs.

RTX.name: RTX Corporation
RTX.catalysts: Munitions +40%; global rearmament cycle; commercial aftermarket
RTX.spaceRelevance: Missile systems, radar, space sensors, satellite systems.

LHX.name: L3Harris Technologies
LHX.catalysts: Record backlog; best organic growth among primes; $7.8B Q1 orders
LHX.spaceRelevance: Tactical radios, satellite payloads, electronic warfare, space systems.
LHX.multibaggerNote: Best prime growth but still large-cap.

ONDS.name: Ondas Inc
ONDS.catalysts: Autonomous border defense program; counter-UAS airports; Blue UAS list; $390M+ FY26 guide
ONDS.risks: Revenue was <$10M a year ago; 10x growth sustainability; profitability unclear
ONDS.spaceRelevance: Autonomous drone systems for border defense, counter-UAS, military ISR.

ACHR.name: Archer Aviation
ACHR.catalysts: First eVTOL in FAA Phase 4; UAE RTC program; $1.78B cash; defense crossover
ACHR.spaceRelevance: eVTOL with defense applications for troop transport, logistics, ISR.
ACHR.multibaggerNote: Binary bet on eVTOL becoming real.

RCAT.name: Red Cat Holdings
RCAT.catalysts: $35M Army SRR (Black Widow); NATO NSPA catalogue; 500+ units/month; EDGE 130
RCAT.risks: $225M dilutive raise; concentrated contract risk; early margins
RCAT.spaceRelevance: Pure-play tactical military drone maker. Black Widow for Army ISR.
RCAT.multibaggerNote: Real contracts, explosive growth, small cap.

PDYN.name: Palladyne AI
PDYN.catalysts: AI drone brain/swarm intelligence; $24-$27M FY26 guide; $47M cash
PDYN.risks: Tiny revenue; speculative; competition from primes
PDYN.spaceRelevance: AI autonomy stack for unmanned systems. Enables collaborative drone swarms.
PDYN.multibaggerNote: AI drone enabler at smallest cap. Speculative moonshot.

UMAC.name: Unusual Machines
UMAC.catalysts: Components to 50%+ Drone Dominance winners; $220M cash; Lantronix on $1.1B program
UMAC.risks: Small revenue; component supplier margins; $760M on $27M rev
UMAC.spaceRelevance: U.S.-made drone components. Benefits from DJI ban / NDAA compliance.

DPRO.name: Draganfly
DPRO.catalysts: AFSOC Flex FPV drones; $147M cash; analyst target $14+
DPRO.risks: Growth lags peers (49% vs 800%+); tiny revenue; Canadian ITAR
DPRO.spaceRelevance: ISR and tactical drones for military.

AVAV.name: AeroVironment
AVAV.catalysts: Switchblade 300/400/600; $743M contract ceiling; $186M Army order; BlueHalo space/cyber
AVAV.spaceRelevance: Military drone leader. Switchblade combat-proven. BlueHalo adds space comms.
AVAV.multibaggerNote: Fallen angel with massive backlog. Needs integration patience.

LMT.name: Lockheed Martin
LMT.catalysts: F-35; THAAD; military satellites; hypersonics; dividend
LMT.risks: Margin compression; 25% off highs; F-35 sustainment costs
LMT.spaceRelevance: Largest defense contractor. Builds military satellites, missile defense, hypersonics.
LMT.multibaggerNote: Defense anchor, income play, not growth.

QRVO.name: Qorvo
QRVO.catalysts: Defense/aero RF expansion; $1.2B cash; non-GAAP gross margin >50%
QRVO.risks: ~70% mobile phone dependency; consumer cyclicality; activist pressure
QRVO.spaceRelevance: RF chips for satellite communication terminals and phased-array antennas.
QRVO.multibaggerNote: RF for sat terminals but heavy mobile dependence.

ADI.name: Analog Devices
ADI.catalysts: Record revenue; A&D at new highs; $1.5B Empower acquisition; 60%+ gross margin
ADI.spaceRelevance: Space-grade signal chain and power solutions for satellite telemetry and comms.
ADI.multibaggerNote: Quality compounder with genuine space exposure.

STM.name: STMicroelectronics
STM.catalysts: 90% LEO chip share; 7.5B Starlink chips; $3B space rev target 2026-2028; $1B space rev in 2026
STM.spaceRelevance: THE Starlink chip backbone. 90% LEO satellite semiconductor market share.
STM.multibaggerNote: Hidden Starlink play. Massively underappreciated space exposure.

NOK.name: Nokia
NOK.catalysts: Moon 4G deployment; AI-RAN CAGR raised to 27%; EUR1B AI/cloud Q1 orders; NTN satellite-5G
NOK.risks: 119% YTD run; core telecom mature; AI-RAN commercialization risk
NOK.spaceRelevance: Deployed 4G on the Moon. NTN roadmap for space-based 5G/6G connectivity.

MP.name: MP Materials
MP.catalysts: Independence magnet facility H2 2026; DoD 10-year $110/kg floor; only Western mine-to-magnet
MP.risks: $12B on $254M rev; magnet facility execution; China retaliation
MP.spaceRelevance: Rare earth magnets for satellite reaction wheels, electric propulsion, drone motors.

FCX.name: Freeport-McMoRan
FCX.catalysts: Copper structural deficit; copper at $5.78/lb; Grasberg mine
FCX.spaceRelevance: Copper for satellite wiring, ground stations, launch pad electrical, data centers.

ATI.name: ATI Inc
ATI.catalysts: $1B Airbus titanium contract; A&D = 69% revenue; record EBITDA trajectory
ATI.spaceRelevance: Titanium alloys for rocket engines, spacecraft structures, satellite bus.
ATI.multibaggerNote: Strong A&D franchise, titanium for rockets.

HXL.name: Hexcel
HXL.catalysts: Carbon fiber for rocket fairings/sats; oligopoly (3 producers); multi-decade cycle
HXL.risks: Slow aerospace build rates; modest growth
HXL.spaceRelevance: Carbon fiber composites for rocket fairings, satellite structures, payload adapters.

AA.name: Alcoa
AA.catalysts: Aluminum prices elevated; dual alumina/aluminum ops
AA.spaceRelevance: Aluminum alloys for spacecraft construction and space station modules.

TECK.name: Teck Resources
TECK.catalysts: Anglo Teck merger; germanium/indium production; record copper 70,300t Q1
TECK.spaceRelevance: Critical minerals (germanium for IR optics, indium for solar cells) used in satellites.
TECK.multibaggerNote: Critical minerals but not differentiated for space.

PKE.name: Park Aerospace
PKE.catalysts: Specialty aerospace composites; $63.6M cash; zero debt
PKE.risks: Tiny, flat revenue; low liquidity; niche
PKE.spaceRelevance: Advanced composites for aerospace structures applicable to satellites/spacecraft.

CRS.name: Carpenter Technology
CRS.catalysts: NASA GRX-810 rocket engine alloy; 90%+ jet engine certification; additive manufacturing
CRS.spaceRelevance: Directly in rocket engine supply chain. NASA partnership for next-gen propulsion alloys.
CRS.multibaggerNote: Best materials play for space propulsion.

GLW.name: Corning
GLW.catalysts: NVIDIA partnership; Meta $6B optical deal; targeting $30B by 2028
GLW.spaceRelevance: Specialty glass and optical fabrication for satellite optical systems and ground stations.

MTRN.name: Materion
MTRN.catalysts: Beryllium for space telescopes (JWST); precision optics; A&D growing
MTRN.spaceRelevance: Beryllium alloys and precision optics for satellite optics and space telescope mirrors.

POET.name: POET Technologies
POET.spaceRelevance: Photonic integration for AI data center optical interconnects
POET.multibaggerNote: Massive upside if optical interposer achieves commercial scale, but extremely early-stage

TEL.name: TE Connectivity
TEL.spaceRelevance: Major connector/sensor supplier for aerospace and defense
TEL.multibaggerNote: Blue-chip compounder, not a multi-bagger at this scale

KEEL.name: Keel Infrastructure
KEEL.multibaggerNote: Interesting pivot with real assets but unproven in AI data centers

LAES.name: SEALSQ Corp
LAES.spaceRelevance: Post-quantum cryptography essential for satellite and defense comms security
LAES.multibaggerNote: Strong secular tailwind from post-quantum mandates, pipeline 10x revenue, small cap for genuine multi-bagger potential
